models.description: Fast reasoning model. Fits entirely in GPU on 8 GB M2. Best default for RAM-constrained machines.
General-purpose / agentic. Strong tool use and reasoning. Needs 16 GB RAM to avoid swap.
Code specialist. Better than qwen3 at diffs, edits, and completion.
Microsoft 3.8B mini model. 128k context, fits fully in GPU on 8 GB M2.
Meta 3B model. Fast and lightweight, good general-purpose fallback.
Small + fast fallback. Good for routing, classification, quick summaries.
